features.name: Way of the Open Hand
features.description: Monks use unarmed movements to strike and dodge.

features.name: Ki Strike
features.description: You can deliver a ki-powered blow that deals an extra 1d8 force damage.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: At level 5, you can attack twice instead of once.

features.name: Martial Arts
features.description: Your unarmed strikes deal +2 damage and allow you to make additional attacks.

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.description: You gain a bonus to AC equal to your Wisdom modifier.

features.name: Stunning Strike
features.description: Once per long rest, you can deliver a stunning blow that causes a target to fall unconscious.

features.name: Unarmored Movement
features.description: You ignore movement penalties for wearing armor.

features.name: Wholeness of Body
features.description: You regain hit points equal to 4d8 when you finish a long rest.

features.name: Perfect Self
features.description: Your body is imbued with ki, granting you resistance to all damage types.
